title: echo · françois chastel
description: A small log of films, essays, and notes by François Chastel.

items.title: Three movements on slowness
items.summary: Notes from a year of writing differently — first in code, then in data, then in confession.

items.title: On slowness
items.summary: There is a particular pleasure in doing one thing slowly when the world is fast — not as a protest, exactly, but as a counterweight.

items.title: Field notes, vol. 3
items.summary: A 90-second study of light through paper.
